panels.description: Saved queries run against the attached site.main schema.
panels.title: Readonly SQL console

queries.sql:
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM site.main.commits) AS commits,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM site.main.content_files) AS content_files,
  (SELECT coalesce(sum(word_count), 0) FROM site.main.content_files) AS words,
  (SELECT CAST(coalesce(sum(bytes), 0) AS DOUBLE) FROM site.main.build_outputs) AS output_bytes,
  (SELECT duration_ms FROM site.main.build_runs ORDER BY finished_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_build_ms,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM site.main.content_links WHERE target_exists = false) AS broken_links,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM site.main.search_pages) AS search_pages,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM site.main.content_terms) AS terms

SELECT
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE kind IN ('docs', 'content')) AS authored_files,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE kind IN ('docs', 'content') AND title IS NULL) AS untitled_files,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE kind IN ('docs', 'content') AND word_count = 0) AS empty_files,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM site.main.content_links) AS local_links,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM site.main.content_links WHERE target_exists = false) AS broken_links,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM site.main.search_pages) AS search_pages,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM site.main.content_terms) AS indexed_terms
FROM site.main.content_files

SELECT day, commit_count, additions, deletions
FROM site.main.commit_daily
ORDER BY day

WITH generated AS (
  SELECT CAST(generated_at AS DATE) AS generated_day
  FROM site.main.meta_info
  LIMIT 1
),
aged AS (
  SELECT
    kind,
    CASE
      WHEN last_commit_at IS NULL THEN 'unknown'
      WHEN date_diff('day', CAST(last_commit_at AS DATE), generated_day) <= 7 THEN '0-7d'
      WHEN date_diff('day', CAST(last_commit_at AS DATE), generated_day) <= 30 THEN '8-30d'
      WHEN date_diff('day', CAST(last_commit_at AS DATE), generated_day) <= 90 THEN '31-90d'
      ELSE '90d+'
    END AS age_bucket,
    CASE
      WHEN last_commit_at IS NULL THEN 5
      WHEN date_diff('day', CAST(last_commit_at AS DATE), generated_day) <= 7 THEN 1
      WHEN date_diff('day', CAST(last_commit_at AS DATE), generated_day) <= 30 THEN 2
      WHEN date_diff('day', CAST(last_commit_at AS DATE), generated_day) <= 90 THEN 3
      ELSE 4
    END AS age_order,
    word_count
  FROM site.main.content_files, generated
  WHERE kind IN ('docs', 'content')
)
SELECT kind, age_bucket, min(age_order) AS age_order, count(*) AS file_count, coalesce(sum(word_count), 0) AS words
FROM aged
GROUP BY kind, age_bucket
ORDER BY age_order, kind

SELECT term, file_count, occurrence_count
FROM site.main.content_terms
ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC, file_count DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT kind, count(*) AS file_count, CAST(sum(bytes) AS DOUBLE) AS bytes
FROM site.main.build_outputs
GROUP BY kind
ORDER BY bytes DESC

SELECT kind, extension, count(*) AS file_count, CAST(sum(bytes) AS DOUBLE) AS bytes
FROM site.main.build_outputs
GROUP BY kind, extension
ORDER BY kind, bytes DESC

SELECT started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, status
FROM site.main.build_runs
ORDER BY started_at

SELECT started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, status, zorto_version, command
FROM site.main.build_runs
ORDER BY finished_at DESC
LIMIT 2

SELECT short_sha, committed_at, subject, file_count, additions, deletions
FROM site.main.commits
ORDER BY committed_at DESC
LIMIT 8

SELECT path, kind, title, word_count, bytes, last_commit_at
FROM site.main.content_files
WHERE kind IN ('docs', 'content')
ORDER BY word_count DESC, bytes DESC
LIMIT 14

SELECT source_path, target, target_path, link_kind, target_exists
FROM site.main.content_links
ORDER BY target_exists ASC NULLS LAST, source_path
LIMIT 14

SELECT path, kind, extension, CAST(bytes AS DOUBLE) AS bytes
FROM site.main.build_outputs
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 14

SELECT ecosystem, name, version, manifest_path
FROM site.main.packages
ORDER BY ecosystem, name

SELECT 'meta_info' AS table_name, count(*) AS rows FROM site.main.meta_info
UNION ALL SELECT 'repo_snapshot', count(*) FROM site.main.repo_snapshot
UNION ALL SELECT 'commits', count(*) FROM site.main.commits
UNION ALL SELECT 'commit_daily', count(*) FROM site.main.commit_daily
UNION ALL SELECT 'packages', count(*) FROM site.main.packages
UNION ALL SELECT 'content_files', count(*) FROM site.main.content_files
UNION ALL SELECT 'content_terms', count(*) FROM site.main.content_terms
UNION ALL SELECT 'search_pages', count(*) FROM site.main.search_pages
UNION ALL SELECT 'content_links', count(*) FROM site.main.content_links
UNION ALL SELECT 'build_runs', count(*) FROM site.main.build_runs
UNION ALL SELECT 'build_outputs', count(*) FROM site.main.build_outputs
UNION ALL SELECT 'pipeline_steps', count(*) FROM site.main.pipeline_steps
ORDER BY rows DESC

SELECT step_name, step_kind, status, duration_ms, output_count, command, detail
FROM site.main.pipeline_steps
ORDER BY started_at

query_presets.label: Catalog
query_presets.sql:
SELECT 'meta_info' AS table_name, count(*) AS rows FROM site.main.meta_info
UNION ALL SELECT 'repo_snapshot', count(*) FROM site.main.repo_snapshot
UNION ALL SELECT 'commits', count(*) FROM site.main.commits
UNION ALL SELECT 'commit_daily', count(*) FROM site.main.commit_daily
UNION ALL SELECT 'packages', count(*) FROM site.main.packages
UNION ALL SELECT 'content_files', count(*) FROM site.main.content_files
UNION ALL SELECT 'content_terms', count(*) FROM site.main.content_terms
UNION ALL SELECT 'search_pages', count(*) FROM site.main.search_pages
UNION ALL SELECT 'content_links', count(*) FROM site.main.content_links
UNION ALL SELECT 'build_runs', count(*) FROM site.main.build_runs
UNION ALL SELECT 'build_outputs', count(*) FROM site.main.build_outputs
UNION ALL SELECT 'pipeline_steps', count(*) FROM site.main.pipeline_steps
ORDER BY rows DESC

query_presets.label: Terms
query_presets.sql:
SELECT term, file_count, occurrence_count
FROM site.main.content_terms
ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC, file_count DESC
LIMIT 30

query_presets.label: Freshness
query_presets.sql:
WITH generated AS (
  SELECT CAST(generated_at AS DATE) AS generated_day
  FROM site.main.meta_info
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT path, kind, word_count, date_diff('day', CAST(last_commit_at AS DATE), generated_day) AS days_since_update
FROM site.main.content_files, generated
WHERE kind IN ('docs', 'content')
ORDER BY days_since_update DESC NULLS LAST, word_count DESC
LIMIT 30

query_presets.label: Outputs
query_presets.sql:
SELECT path, kind, extension, CAST(bytes AS DOUBLE) AS bytes
FROM site.main.build_outputs
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 30

query_presets.label: Links
query_presets.sql:
SELECT source_path, target, target_path, link_kind, target_exists
FROM site.main.content_links
ORDER BY target_exists ASC NULLS LAST, source_path
LIMIT 40
